text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Once upon a time, a long time ago... There lived
a little old man, a little old woman, and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The ever-glorious T.M. Opera O, who descended
to them on golden wings with pomp and
circumstance!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
One day, Granddad, Grandmom, and Opera O
went to pull radishes from the field when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
"Ohh, what a miraculous thing to witness! Eleven
radishes have grown, and shine with golden
brilliance! Grandmother, we must prepare this
heavenly meal, posthaste!"

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
"Sure, dearie. I'll put these capable hands to
work, so be a lamb and set the table, Opera O."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! That was spectacular, Acute... When I speak
with you, I'm overwhelmed by a flood of yet
unseen spectacles from the imagination!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's a new opera, King Radish, Feller of Demons! The moment I finish writing it, I'll invite you to a special front-row seat!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My, how delightful. I'll be looking forward to it,
dear.
